Feature_Name: Inter-gNB-DU LTM Handover UE Context Setup Procedure
Feature_Description: This procedure is used for the case when the UE moves from one gNB-DU to another gNB-DU within the same gNB-CU during NR operation for LTM.
Feature_Objectives: The gNB-CU sends a UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST message to the candidate gNB-DU(s) for each candidate cell, containing one candidate cell ID and the CSI resource configuration for subsequent LTM.
The gNB-CU may provide the LTM configuration ID mapping list to the candidate gNB-DU(s).
The gNB-CU may request PRACH resources from the candidate gNB-DU(s).

The gNB-CU may request the candidate gNB-DU(s) to provide the lower layer configuration for the purpose of generating the reference configuration or provide the lower layer part of the reference configuration to the candidate gNB-DU(s).

If the candidate gNB-DU accepts the request of LTM configuration, it responds with a UE CONTEXT SETUP RESPONSE message including the generated lower layer RRC configurations for the accepted target candidate cell.
Feature_Implementation_Steps: The gNB-CU determines to initiate LTM configuration.

The gNB-CU sends a UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST message to the candidate gNB-DU(s) for each candidate cell, containing one candidate cell ID and the CSI resource configuration for subsequent LTM. The gNB-CU may provide the LTM configuration ID mapping list to the candidate gNB-DU(s). The gNB-CU may request PRACH resources from the candidate gNB-DU(s). The gNB-CU may request the candidate gNB-DU(s) to provide the lower layer configuration for the purpose of generating the reference configuration or provide the lower layer part of the reference configuration to the candidate gNB-DU(s).

If the candidate gNB-DU accepts the request of LTM configuration, it responds with a UE CONTEXT SETUP RESPONSE message including the generated lower layer RRC configurations for the accepted target candidate cell.
Procedure_Implementation_Steps: gNB-CU prepares and sends F1AP 'UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST' message to the candidate gNB-DU.
Candidate gNB-DU receives F1AP 'UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST' message, processes it, and responds with F1AP 'UE CONTEXT SETUP RESPONSE' message.
gNB-CU handles the F1AP 'UE CONTEXT SETUP RESPONSE' message received from the candidate gNB-DU.

Code_Instructions.description: Data structure defining the format of the F1AP UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST message, essential for initiating the UE context setup procedure at the gNB-DU.
Data structure defining the format of the F1AP UE CONTEXT SETUP RESPONSE message, used by the gNB-DU to acknowledge and provide configuration details to the gNB-CU.
Helper function responsible for preparing or encoding the F1AP UE Context Setup Request message for transmission, likely populating the corresponding data structure.
Utility function to populate or copy information into the F1AP UE Context Setup Request message structure, facilitating the construction of the message content.
Supporting utility function to retrieve the UE's context information, which is a prerequisite for preparing any UE-specific F1AP messages, including the UE Context Setup Request.

Piggy_Backed_IES_Info: Not applicable for the scoped messages in this procedure.
